## [00:00 - 01:12]

The 7-day contact. The reason I'm calling John is it's been about 7 days now and by this time I want to make sure that you've had your product installed long enough working with it enough that you might have some questions. Now look if you don't like the questions question because some of you don't you're like oh man every time I ask that question it's going to get me in trouble. Look if there's problems, if there's trouble you need to find out about it, you need to initiate and you need to resolve it. If you're selling to the public, you're selling to human beings, trust me, you're going to have problems, you're going to have people dissatisfied, you're going to have questions. All these questions, problems, situations, or actually opportunities if you just change your mind about it. Remember the 7-day period, this should have been at least three contacts by now. You're still in the hottest time after the purchase. This is a great time, a great time to continue to pick up referrals and ask questions like, anybody been impressed with it? What kind of compliments are you getting? This is a vital time to resolve issues like I discussed. Don't delay it and always look for second sales, not with others but within this family, within this company. You're going to find a second sale if you keep your eyes open.
